events.title: Student Graduation
events.description: Celebrate our your loved one's dance accomplishments and enjoy some social dancing with all of our graduates!

events.title: Freestyles
events.description: Test your skills and enjoy dancing with your peers in this fun multi-heat dance event! Talk to your instructor to learn how to participate.

events.title: Bachata Intensive
events.description: Join us for a focused Bachata class designed to build technique and confidence on the floor.

events.title: Saint Patrick's Day Potluck Party
events.description: Celebrate with us! Bring a dish to share and enjoy an evening of food, friends, and plenty of dancing.

events.title: Classic Animation Showcase
events.description: Enjoy watching our students perform to music from classic animated shows and movies!
